basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 45 years who have a Ph.D. in Agronomy or M.Sc. (Ag) in Agronomy with required experience and qualifications are eligible to apply for this Research Associate post. The Walk-in Interview for ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 26 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: Not exceeding 40 years (For Men); Not exceeding 45 years (For Women)

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Agronomy, M.Sc Or B.Sc.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Agronomy or M.Sc. (Ag) in Agronomy with 1st Division or overall grade point average with 4/5 years of B.Sc. (Ag). All relevant degrees should be completed in ICAR accredited Universities/Colleges. 03 years of experience as evidence from fellowship/Associateship/Training/Other engagements. One Research Paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (>4.0) Journal.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 61,000/- + HRA - Rs. 67,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 61,000/- + HRA - Rs. 67,000/- + HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being recruited for?
faq.answer: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) is recruiting for the post of Research Associate (Agronomy).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate (Agronomy) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview. No prior online application is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 26 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. in Agronomy or M.Sc. (Ag) in Agronomy with 1st Division, along with specific experience and research paper publication criteria.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years, with age relaxation provided for women candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- + HRA to Rs. 67,000/- + HRA Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University, Nandyal, Andhra Pradesh, 515591.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
